title: AI PCs that bring smarter performance to everyday computing
description: AI PCs bring artificial intelligence directly into everyday computing, using dedicated neural processors to handle tasks like real-time assistance, faster content creation and smarter workflows.
content: Artificial intelligence has begun moving from the cloud into the laptop itself. That shift is what defines the new generation of AI PCs. Instead of relying entirely on remote servers, these machines carry dedicated AI engines that handle tasks such a... [12357 chars]

title: Scientists Gave Mice and AI the Same Task, And The Results Were Strangely Similar
description: In a groundbreaking study, mice and AI agents independently learned to cooperate on tasks, revealing shared principles of coordination. Both biological and artificial intelligence developed similar strategies, including pausing and mutual engagement, to enhance success. Researchers found that specific brain regions in mice and neural networks in AI mirrored each other's cooperation mechanisms, suggesting universal rules govern collaborative behavior.

title: The Rise of AI-Augmented Remote Work: How Fthen Is Redefining the Global Workforce
description: For decades, the global workforce has been shaped by geography. Where a person lived largely determined the type of work they could access and the income they could earn. title: Jack Dorsey's mass job cuts expose tech's bogus narrative
description: Block Inc. CEO Jack Dorsey announced significant layoffs, framing them as a move towards artificial intelligence. This strategy mirrors a long-standing Silicon Valley tradition of reinterpreting setbacks as forward-thinking innovation. The company's past decisions, including over-hiring and questionable acquisitions, are now overshadowed by this new narrative. This approach aims to reshape perceptions and influence market perception.

title: Jack Dorsey's Mass Job Cuts Expose Tech's Bogus Narrative
description: When Block Inc. title: Masterpiece or cheap copy? Art historians and AI may not agree
description: Artificial intelligence is weighing into art history debates by “authenticating” masterpieces and exposing alleged fakes. But experts aren’t convinced.
